title: Brew Compat
description: A Botania addon adding potions from other mods as Botania brews
body:
This is a simple Botania addon which adds potion effects from other mods as Botania brews, meaning you can make vials, flasks, tainted blood pendants and incense sticks from them.

Currently supported mods:
 - [Size Shifting Potions](https://modrinth.com/mod/sizeshiftingpotions)
